message:
test(integration): enrich 4 integration test files with +34 new tests

- governance_scorecard.rs: 6→16 (+10) — serde round-trips, error display, events, markdown, tampered signature
- attestation_safe_mode_fallback.rs: 6→16 (+10) — initial state, valid health, serde, error display, config, accumulation
- runtime_observability.rs: 6→12 (+6) — serde, event ordering, sensitive data hashing, metrics counting
- lowering_pipeline.rs: 6→14 (+8) — individual passes, static semantics, flow proof, witness consistency, context propagation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
